title: Add hero proof frames to partner and enterprise comparison pages and polish the compare mega menu
summary: Records release evidence for upgrading the remaining partner, RevOps, solutions engineering, enterprise architecture, and enterprise procurement comparison pages with top-of-page hero proof framing. This batch also hardens the desktop and mobile Compare mega menu so it stays inside the viewport, scrolls cleanly, and uses workflow-specific icons instead of a long undifferentiated list.
completed_todo_items: Improve real user experience in website SEO, GEO, and AIO quality on the remaining comparison pages.
Fix the Compare mega menu so it no longer overlaps the viewport and better communicates page intent with icons.

tests.notes: next lint does not accept CSS files via --file, so the scrollbar styling was validated through the production build instead.

smoke_or_visibility.notes: A clean production build completed successfully with the new viewport-bounded Compare menu and the remaining comparison-page hero proof frames in place.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the five comparison-page hero proof insertions plus the Compare mega menu and scrollbar styling changes if the menu density or decision framing needs to be reworked.
